Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: implement TAPI retry handling - Phase 3 (Storage Extensions) (#296)

* feat: implement Phase 3 - Storage Extensions

Add persistence for RetryState to survive app restarts.

Changes:
- Added Storage.Constants.RetryState for the storage key
- Created RetryStateStorage.kt with extension functions:
  * saveRetryState(state): Serialize and save to storage
  * loadRetryState(): Load from storage, returns defaults on error
  * clearRetryState(): Remove persisted state
- Defensive error handling:
  * Returns defaults on missing/corrupt JSON
  * Never throws exceptions
  * Uses kotlinx.serialization for JSON conversion
- Created RetryStateStorageTest.kt with 10 tests:
  * Save/load roundtrip
  * Default handling (no data, corrupt JSON, invalid structure)
  * Clear functionality
  * Multiple batch metadata entries
  * Null field handling
  * Overwrite behavior

All tests pass (10 new + 24 state machine + 16 config = 50 total)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: stabilize flaky WaitingTests for CI

The multi-plugin WaitingTests were flaky in CI because coroutine chains
from resume() (store dispatch → subscription → event replay) could
remain pending when assertions ran. Adding testScheduler.runCurrent()
drains pending coroutines at the current virtual time without advancing
time (which would trigger the 30s ForceRunningAction timeout).

commit.message:
Fix post-login redirect landing on HTMX partial URLs

When a session expires mid-page, HTMX requests to fragment routes
(e.g. /sidebar) were saving those URLs as the post-login destination.
After login, the user landed on the raw fragment instead of the app.

For HTMX requests, use / as the return URL so login always lands on
the home page.

commit.message:
fix: dedicated thread pool for relay streams to prevent e2e timeouts

Replace the default ThreadPoolExecutor (max_workers=min(32, cpu+4))
with a dedicated 128-thread pool for blocking gRPC relay streams.
When many tasks run concurrently, the default pool saturates and
queued threads cannot receive key_exchange in time, causing
e2e_payload_timeout on the worker side.

commit.message:
fix: case-insensitive side comparison in trade matching (BUY/SELL vs buy/sell)

Alpaca SDK returns side as uppercase ('BUY'/'SELL') but DB stores
lowercase ('buy'/'sell'). This caused reconcile_trades and audit_trades
to never match any orders, silently treating all fills as missing.
Same root cause as the status field case bug.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Switch metal prices from gold-api.com to Yahoo Finance (GC=F / SI=F)

gold-api.com was unreachable from some Docker containers due to missing
iptables MASQUERADE rules (no outbound internet from container). Yahoo
Finance already works for stocks/ETFs on all instances.

Mapping: XAU → GC=F (Gold Futures), XAG → SI=F (Silver Futures)
Prices are near-identical: GC=F 5143.9 vs gold-api 5140.9 USD,
SI=F 86.93 vs gold-api 86.77 USD (futures premium only).

Reuses existing getStockPrice() which handles Yahoo Finance calls,
USD→EUR conversion, and error handling consistently.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix SSL FileNotFoundError in py2app bundle by patching ssl.create_default_context

Patches ssl.create_default_context at startup to always load certifi's
bundled CA file, preventing the google-genai client from failing with
FileNotFoundError when the system CA store path is missing inside the bundle.

commit.message:
Major model upgrades: GJR-GARCH, fat tails, regime detection, skew, FOMC

9 improvements implemented:

1. GJR-GARCH: Replaces symmetric GARCH(1,1) with asymmetric GJR-GARCH
   that models leverage effect (bad news spikes vol more than good news)
2. Student's t PoP: Probability of Profit now uses fat-tailed distribution
   fitted to actual historical returns instead of log-normal
3. Transaction costs: Backtest includes $0.65 commission + $0.025 slippage
4. De-biased backtest: Uses IV = RV * 1.2 to remove circular bias
5. Regime detection: Classifies crash/high_vol/normal/low_vol using VIX
   level, term structure, and RV acceleration. Overrides signals in crash.
6. Skew scoring: 25-delta put/call skew penalizes trade scores when market
   is pricing tail risk into puts
7. Portfolio beta-weighting: SPY beta per holding + portfolio beta with
   warnings when directional risk is concentrated
8. Expanded IV recording: Stores 25d put/call IV alongside ATM IV for
   richer skew history over time
9. FOMC calendar: Hardcoded 2025-2026 FOMC dates with warnings and
   expiration span flags

Updated Getting Started guide to reflect improvements.

Move Chapter 2 general provisions mandate to server-level instructions

The LLM was not consistently calling get_general_provisions() alongside
other tools. Fix by making it a top-level server instruction that applies
to every query, rather than per-tool description hints that depend on
the LLM making the right follow-up calls.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: wire intro/outro frames + stat detection into render pipeline

- render.ts: total duration = introFrames + audioFrames + outroFrames
- render.ts: broll slots distributed over audioFrames (not total), so they
  stay relative to the main content Sequence
- render.ts: calls detectStatMoments and passes statMoments/introEndFrame/outroStartFrame
- scripts/testRender.ts: Wemby test input for local smoke testing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Jinja2 template syntax error in payment_periods.html

Use {% set %} to avoid quote nesting in onsubmit confirm message.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(dashboard): derive orchestrator URL from window.hostname at runtime

NEXT_PUBLIC_* vars are baked into the JS bundle at build time, so
localhost:3000 was hardcoded. Switch to dynamic window.location.hostname
so the dashboard works on any server (Hetzner, local, etc.) without
needing a rebuild per-environment.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

refactor: rename traits to provider-agnostic names and use lifecycle primitives (#52)

* refactor(clients): rename traits to provider-agnostic names

Mechanical rename of provider-specific trait names to role-based names
to prepare for swappable backend support (Phase 3):
- KeycloakApi -> IdentityProvider
- MasApi -> AuthService
- SynapseApi -> MatrixService

Concrete implementations (KeycloakClient, MasClient, SynapseClient)
and generic traits (IdentityProviderApi, RoomManagementApi) are
unchanged.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor(disable): use shared lifecycle step primitives

Replace ~90 lines of inline session-revocation and account-disable
logic with calls to the composable primitives in lifecycle_steps.rs,
matching the pattern already used by offboard_user.

Audit action names changed to match the primitive naming convention:
- revoke_mas_session_on_disable -> revoke_auth_session_on_disable
- disable_keycloak_account -> disable_identity_account_on_disable

commit.message:
Fix: Trigger alerts whenever threshold is reached

Remove direction check - alerts now trigger on every threshold breach.
Reference price is updated after each alert, allowing continuous
alerts when price keeps moving in the same direction.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: case-insensitive status check in get_filled_orders (was silently returning empty)

Alpaca SDK returns 'OrderStatus.FILLED' (uppercase) but the filter
checked for 'OrderStatus.filled' (lowercase) — case mismatch caused
get_filled_orders() to always return []. reconcile_trades() was
therefore always seeing 0 Alpaca orders and reporting 'DB up to date'
even when fills were missing. Every reconcile since deploy has been
a no-op.

Add view transitions, active nav, product filtering, 404 page

   transitions with custom fade. Scroll-reveal observer re-initialises
   after each navigation via astro:after-swap event.

   prop — /digiscaff shows only DigiScaff, /digiperim shows only
   DigiPerim, keeping shared infrastructure strip on both.

commit.message:
Replace unicornstudio-react package with direct SDK script loading

The unicornstudio-react/next subpath export fails to resolve on Vercel
regardless of webpack config. Removed the package dependency entirely —
UnicornHero now loads the SDK JS directly via a script tag and calls
UnicornStudio.init() imperatively, which is what the package did internally.
Reverted next.config.js to defaults.

commit.message:
P0-T5: Add driver install/uninstall and test-signing scripts

- setup-testsigning.ps1: enable test-signing, create self-signed cert,
  export to certs/, add to Trusted Root store
- install-driver.ps1: sign driver, create kernel service, start, verify
- uninstall-driver.ps1: stop, delete service, optional disable test-signing

All require elevation. Ready for use once Phase 1 produces a .sys binary.

commit.message:
multi-project support: CLI and dashboard

Agent polls repos from all user's projects simultaneously. Status
and log commands show data across all projects. Run infers project
from repo or accepts --project flag. New `spillover projects` command.
Dashboard project selector always visible with inline create/join.

commit.message:
Admin "Verwerken" pagina — one-click order processing workflow

Nieuwe /admin/verwerken pagina met:
- Overzicht van alle openstaande orders (betaald, klaar om te verzenden)
- One-click "Verzend" per order (PostNL label + status + email automatisch)
- "Alles verzenden" batch knop voor alle orders tegelijk
- Picklist modus: welke producten gepakt moeten worden met checkboxes
- Pakbon en label download per order
- Mobiel-optimized met sticky batch button

Plus: pakbon knop toegevoegd aan order detail pagina, rocket icon in nav.
